news.t: This commodities strategy can protect you from inflation, scarcity and even price declines
Harbor Commodity All-Weather Strategy ETF (Ticker: HGER), Subadvised by Quantix Commodities, Surpasses $2 Billion in Assets
This five-star all-weather ETF can lower your exposure to risky stocks and bonds
Harbor Capital Advisors Celebrates 3-Year Anniversary with HGER, the Harbor ETF Managed by Strategic Partner Quantix Commodities
Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Corporate Culture Leaders Strategy

overview.description: The Harbor Commodity All-Weather Strategy ETF (HGER) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Quantix Commodity index. The fund tracks an index designed to provide broad exposure to inflation-sensitive commodities, selected and weighted based on fundamental and technical factors. The objective of the fund is to hedge inflation HGER was launched on Feb 9, 2022 and is issued by Harbor.

data.text: The Harbor Commodity All-Weather Strategy ETF has matched the S&P 500's performance since the fund was launched in February 2022 — but it has been a much smoother ride.
